name: Communication Signal Production
description: Communication Signal Production in Animals. This process represents a higher-level biological mechanism distinct from molecular/biochemical processes covered in GLMP.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A19[Information Source] --> B19[Signal Encoding]
    B19 --> C19[Signal Modality Selection]
    C19 --> D19[Vocal Production]
    C19 --> E19[Chemical Release]
    C19 --> F19[Visual Display]
    D19 --> G19[Signal Transmission]
    E19 --> G19
    F19 --> G19
    G19 --> H19[Receptor Detection]
    H19 --> I19[Response Elicitation]
    
    style A19 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style B19 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style C19 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

sources.title: Programming Framework: A Universal Process Visualization Methodology
sources.notes: Higher-level biological process visualization: Communication Signal Production. Created using the Programming Framework methodology for organismal and ecological process analysis.

sources.title: Evolution of vocal production learning in mammals.
Behavioral neurobiology in the 21st century: a neuroethological perspective.
sources.journal: Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A.

notes: Higher-level biological process. GLMP covers biochemical/molecular processes; this database covers organismal/ecological processes.
